texto: Do you have still the dye with which to turn your tunic red?’‘The madder? Yes, I do.’‘Enough of it for a century?’‘Enough for the entire cohort, if you want it.’He twitched a smile then; I was coming to know it, and to revel in the sight of it. I was his then, part of the XIIth, and he knew it.‘Not the entire cohort yet, Demalion. The century will do. Henceforth we are the Bloody First. And I fancy we might have a mule’s tail on our standard. See to it on our return.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de M.C. Scott que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Do you have still the dye with which to turn your tunic red?’‘The madder? Yes, I do.’‘Enough of i…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, ancient-rome, pride, com foco em pride e soldiers.
